aeo_readiness.summary: Sewell Electric & HVAC has a solid foundation but lacks key optimizations to ensure AI assistants cite them as a top choice for HVAC services in Franklin, TN.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with detailed service information.
Expand conversational FAQ content to align with common AI queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a strong rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to boost visibility.
Q&A section is inactive and unmanaged.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all major directories.
action_items: Expand NAP citations to industry-specific directories.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite having FAQ content.
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions and geo-coordinates.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance tasks.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in Franklin, TN' where AI assistants prioritize sites with rich schema and detailed service info.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema and expanding existing FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts by showcasing certifications, awards, and detailed service expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top choice for HVAC queries in Franklin, TN.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Sewell Electric & HVAC misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with richer schema and conversational content are consistently cited by AI assistants for HVAC-related queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach enhances schema markup, creates conversational content, and optimizes GBP to ensure Sewell Electric & HVAC is prominently featured in AI search results.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: Are You Ready for the Future of HVAC Search?
opening_line: We analyzed Sewell Electric & HVAC's digital presence and identified key opportunities to boost your visibility with AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI-driven growth.
